_publications._publicationTitle: Aberrant ATRX protein expression is associated with poor overall survival in NF1-MPNST.

_contextSnippet: aberrant ATRX expression was found to be an independent poor prognostic factor with a hazard ratio of 5.3 (95%CI:1.367–20.433)
details: Performed multivariate analysis identifying aberrant ATRX expression as independent poor prognostic factor with hazard ratio of 5.3 (95%CI:1.367–20.433, p = 0.0158)
